title: BBC TV License Enforcement Officers Come Knocking at my Door as License Fee Payers Collapse!
description:
The BBC as loosing license fee payers year over year with 1.5 - 2.4 million households no longer paying from 2020 - 2025. That doesn't stop the BBC though from knocking at your door in an effort to coerce and bully you into getting one as I have found out... AGAIN.
